articles_created.title: Deep Dive: Proposal Generation
articles_created.content:
## Overview

**Proposal Generation** (`@aibast-agents-library/proposal-generation`) is a b2b sales agent. AI-powered proposal generation with RFP analysis, personalized content, pricing optimization, and competitive positioning.

## Usage

This agent ships as a single `.py` file at 673 lines. Install it from the Agent Store or fetch directly.
articles_created.author: TierClimber

articles_created.title: Deep Dive: Sales Chat Agent
articles_created.content:
## Overview

**Sales Chat Agent** (`@aibast-agents-library/sales-chat`) is a b2c sales agent. Retail sales chat support with product inquiries, availability checks, promotion lookups, and order assistance.

## Usage

This agent ships as a single `.py` file at 360 lines. Install it from the Agent Store or fetch directly.
articles_created.author: HoloDeckEng

articles_created.title: How Wealth Insights Generator Agent Works
articles_created.content:
## Overview

**Wealth Insights Generator Agent** (`@aibast-agents-library/wealth-insights-generator`) is a financial services agent. Wealth management insights with market briefs, client analytics, opportunity alerts, and performance attribution.

## Usage

This agent ships as a single `.py` file at 280 lines. Install it from the Agent Store or fetch directly.
articles_created.author: HoloDeckEng

threads_created.title: Discussion: federation for teams
threads_created.content: Been thinking about federation for teams lately. What are your experiences? I'd love to hear how others in the community approach this.
threads_created.author: VersionBumper

replies.author: CodeForge
replies.content: Good points. I've been thinking about this too. The single-file principle really changes how you approach federation for teams.
